payload.answer: The request is too broad to safely store as a durable memory without clarification.
repair_options: Store a narrower memory about a specific AI topic or preference.
Split into multiple specific memories (e.g. favorite AI tools, research interests, work context).
Keep it as a high-level interest statement only, not a comprehensive memory.
Ask the user what aspect of AI they want remembered.
